summary: Excellent soundboard recording of an amazing show highlighted by a stellar Dark Star and superb Morning Dew
review: The reviewer raves about the pristine soundboard capture and rates the performance as outstanding, calling out a “great Dark Star” and a “really good Morning Dew.” No flaws are mentioned, indicating both high‑quality audio and a top‑notch musical outing.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review praises both the recording fidelity and the performance, justifying an almost‑perfect rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the recording as “awesome” and notes that soundboard versions from this era are usually stream‑only, implying a clear, well‑balanced mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing, but the reviewer’s overall enthusiasm suggests a consistently strong set.
